title: Toolbar button background styling + version bump to 0.4.147

requirements.text: Update the application version string in frontend/src/lib/appVersion.ts from '0.4.143' to '0.4.147'.
acceptanceCriteria: The exported version string in appVersion.ts reads '0.4.147'

requirements.text: In the toolbar div of FileList.tsx, apply styling changes to exactly three buttons identified by XPath positions button[2], button[3], and button[4] within the toolbar's button group div: (1) Remove any border color styling from all three buttons. (2) button[2] (the File upload button): set background color to '#eff6ff' (very light blue). (3) button[3] and button[4] (the Folder-related buttons): set background color to '#fefce8' (very light yellow). No other buttons, components, styles, or logic may be changed.

quotes: button[3] and button[4] (Folder buttons): very light yellow background `#fefce8`

acceptanceCriteria: button[2] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#eff6ff' and no border color styling
button[3] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#fefce8' and no border color styling
button[4] in the toolbar has backgroundColor '#fefce8' and no border color styling
All other buttons and components remain byte-for-byte identical to v0.4.143
No tooltip logic, breadcrumb, or other component is modified

constraints: Only FileList.tsx (toolbar buttons) and appVersion.ts may be modified — no other files
Changes must be surgical: only the three specified buttons and the version string are altered
No style refactoring, no tooltip logic changes, no breadcrumb changes
nonGoals: Changing any other toolbar buttons beyond button[2], button[3], button[4]
Any layout or interaction pattern changes
